calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Continued To Nov-25-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-25-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-25-2002 Judgment Entered

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for a Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Floyd L. Butler. Plaintiff, Sandy Xin Liu Di was represented by Gordon Y. Yamamoto, Esq. amd Defendant, Chung Hon Wong appeared in pro per. The case did not settle. Plaintiff having failed to produce the jury instructions, the Court ordered the request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
